+    
+        # Create a temporary file to buffer the request body
+        body_file = SpooledTemporaryFile(max_size=64 * 1024)
+    
+        # Collect all body chunks
+        more_body = True
+        while more_body:
+            message = await receive()
+            body_file.write(message.get("body", b""))
+            more_body = message.get("more_body", False)
+    
+        # Seek to the beginning for reading
+        body_file.seek(0)
+    
+        # Wrap send for synchronous use
+        self.sync_send = AsyncToSync(send)
+    
+        # Run the WSGI application
+        await self.run_wsgi_app(body_file)

+        # Close the body file
